title: January 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Unboxing
caption_used:
January's Kitchen bringing back those Oxford Street exclusive vibes and spa store memories! 🌟📦💭 
Eye Mask: Striking blue and soft 100% cotton mask 👁️👁️
Butterball Body Lotion: Still the thickest, dreamiest texture - vanilla comfort in a pot 🧈☁️ 
Sleepy Shower Gummy: From the Shaun the Sheep collab era, malty lavender magic continues 🐑💜
Forty Winks Massage Bar: Temple balm heritage meets massage bar luxury 💆‍♀️✨ 
Lavender Vida Loca Soap: Chamomile and lavender tradition for bedtime rituals 🌙💜 
Softy Foot Lotion: Marshmallow root softness for those feet 🦶
Dream Time Naked Bath Oil: Temple balm roots transformed into bath oil luxury 🛁
Golden Slumbers Bath Bomb: Accessible beyond Oxford Street - golden waters for all! ⭐💛
nostalgia_notes: Eye mask: Part of Lush's beloved Sleepy range, a fan-favourite sleep-aid collection that has built a devoted following since its launch
Eye mask: The Sleepy eye mask is a Kitchen and exclusive product designed as part of the broader Sleepy sleep range
Eye mask: Companion product to the iconic Sleepy body lotion and Twilight bath bomb, extending the lavender-tonka sleep ritual
Butterball: Butterball is one of Lush's most enduring and beloved bath bombs, a staple since the early days and a perennial fan favourite for its simple, skin-loving luxury
Butterball: One of Lush's longest-running products, Butterball has been a mainstay on the main line for decades before appearing as Kitchen iterations
Butterball: The original Butterball bath bomb, a Lush classic known for its cocoa butter and almond oil skin-softening properties

Sleepy: The Sleepy range took the Lush world by storm and became a cult phenomenon, with fans swearing by its sleep-inducing lavender and tonka scent — this shower gummy brings that magic into the bathroom routine
Sleepy: The Sleepy scent family launched as a body lotion and expanded into a full range of products; shower gummy formats are a newer Kitchen innovation
Sleepy: A shower gummy interpretation of the iconic Sleepy body lotion, carrying the same malty lavender and tonka bean scent
Forty Winks: Forty Winks has long been a cherished product in Lush's sleep and relaxation repertoire, beloved by fans who use it as part of a bedtime massage ritual
Forty Winks: Forty Winks massage bar has appeared in various formats across Lush's main line and Kitchen over the years, consistently featuring lavender and rosemary as hero notes
Forty Winks: Part of Lush's sleep-focused product family alongside Sleepy and Dream Time, sharing the lavender-led relaxation theme
Lavender Vida Loca: A playful nod to Lush's Vida Loca naming tradition, beloved by fans who enjoy Lush's whimsical product names paired with genuinely calming formulas
Lavender Vida Loca: Lavender Vida Loca is a Kitchen-exclusive soap that fits into the January 2026 sleep-themed box, featuring lavender and chamomile as key botanicals
Lavender Vida Loca: Shares its calming lavender and chamomile spirit with the broader Lush sleep range, acting as a cleansing companion to products like Sleepy and Forty Winks
Softy: Softy foot lotion is a Kitchen gem that fans of Lush's indulgent body care line adore for its gentle, comforting formula perfect for tired feet
Softy: Softy has appeared as a Kitchen exclusive foot lotion, celebrated for its marshmallow root and rich butter blend aimed at intense foot softening
Softy: Evokes the same cosy, marshmallow-soft comfort as products like Sleepy, making it a natural bedtime foot-care companion
Dream Time: Naked bath oils are a fan-favourite Kitchen format, and Dream Time resonates deeply with those who love Lush's sleep-focused range and the ritual of a calming evening bath
Dream Time: Dream Time naked bath oil is a Kitchen exclusive that fits within Lush's growing sleep and relaxation product family, using a naked/solid format to reduce packaging
Dream Time: A solid bath oil companion to the Sleepy and Twilight range, channelling the same calming, sleep-inducing botanical oils in a luxurious cocoa butter base

Golden slumbers: The name is a nod to the beloved Beatles song, instantly evoking warmth and nostalgia — fans of Lush's sleep range adore this bath bomb for combining glittering, golden visuals with genuinely calming botanicals

Golden slumbers: Golden Slumbers bath bomb has appeared as a Kitchen and seasonal exclusive, celebrated for its golden glittering waters and sleep-focused botanical blend of chamomile, lavender, and neroli
Golden slumbers: Shares its lavender and chamomile sleep-inducing DNA with the wider Lush sleep range, with neroli adding a brightening, clarifying twist reminiscent of products like Twilight
